dialogos.texto_en: Five months have passed since that night.
As they said before about my choices not mattering,\nneither Nino nor Miku\nchanged their attitudes towards me.
In fact, it might be fair to say\nthat their intensity increased. They were constantly\naware of each other, competing in strange ways...
Ichika had a more reserved attitude,\nbut it was clear that she had feelings towards me.
Of course, she didn't say it outright,\nbut that's...just how Ichika is.
As she said before, Yotsuba was always there\nto cheer Nino and Miku on.
Itsuki was the one who struggled the most.\nShe was always there\nto stop Nino and Miku from going too far.
Of course, she knew that I was struggling too.
She often gave me a look\nthat seemed to say 'do something about it.'
Still, I had no intention of changing my decision.
As autumn ended and winter began,\nwe entered the final stages\nof our entrance exam studies.
Nino and Miku seemed to calm down a bit,\nperhaps thinking about Itsuki\nwho was preparing for her own exams.
In a way, it was like returning to our relationship\nbefore the school festival.
Before we knew it, the new year had come,\nexams were over%p-2;――
And graduation was just around the corner.
